title: Blink Charging Q4 2025 and Full Year Results
text: Blink Charging announced fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results showing continued transformation toward recurring revenue model. Q4 2025 revenue of $27.0 million fell short of analyst expectations, representing 3.5% decline from Q4 2024. Full year 2025 revenue totaled $103.5 million, down from $124.0 million in 2024. However, service revenues surged 62% year-over-year to $14.7 million in Q4, now representing 54% of total quarterly revenue. For the full year, service revenues increased 44.7% to $49.3 million. Adjusted EPS loss of -$0.11 was better than prior year -$0.17. Product revenues dropped 36% to $11.0 million as company transitioned to contract manufacturing. CEO Mike Battaglia stated: 2025 was defined by our disciplined execution and strengthening the core of our business. Company reduced operating expenses by 54% and ended year with $39.5 million in cash and no debt following $20 million equity offering in December 2025.
